disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Herald patch then a Christmas-tree distribution of oval patches with a collarette (inner) scale along skin cleavage lines, after a viral prodrome, sparing the face, palms and soles
trigger_question_examples: Did it start with one bigger 'herald' patch before the rest, and do the patches follow the lines of your skin on your back?
Is there a fine scale just inside the edge of each oval patch?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, one big patch first, then lots of smaller ovals along the skin lines with a fine scale just inside the edge.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No lesions on the palms or soles, no mouth/genital ulcers, no recent unprotected sexual risk features (screens secondary syphilis); no new drug (screens drug eruption)
trigger_question_examples: Is there any rash on your palms or soles, or any mouth or genital sores?
Have you started any new medicine recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No rash on my palms or soles, no mouth or genital sores, and no new medicines.
